name: HWR_EDUCATION_B
description: The education table stores profile education data.

columns.Name: EDUCATION_ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary key for the education table.

columns.Name: SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: The Id of the source for the profile which has the education.

columns.Name: ACTIVITIES
columns.Comments: The list of activities the person participated in.

columns.Name: DEGREE
columns.Comments: The degree awarded to the person.

columns.Name: END_DATE
columns.Comments: The date the person completed education.

columns.Name: FIELD_OF_STUDY
columns.Comments: The field of study of the person.

columns.Name: SCHOOL_INSTITUTION_NAME
columns.Comments: The name of the school or institution at which education took place.

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: The date the person began education.

columns.Name: EDUCATION_TYPE
columns.Comments: The education type of the education.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
